compiled_state.title: [harvest-worktree.sh]: WORKTREE_BRANCH == session branch -> git branch -D runs unconditionally against current branch
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Deferred Review Nitpick

#### Expected Behavior

In the post-merge cleanup block (lines 198-221), when `_harvest_worktree_path == _harvest_session_root` (i.e., harvest-worktree.sh was invoked with the caller's currently-checked-out branch), the self-removal guard correctly skips `git worktree remove` but `git branch -D "$WORKTREE_BRANCH"` on line 218 runs unconditionally.

git rejects deleting the current branch, so the command fails; `|| true` suppresses the error so merge exit status is preserved. Functionally safe — no damage occurs.

#### Actual Behavior

`git branch -D` is attempted against the current branch in this edge case. Output from the failed deletion is swallowed. A stricter form would also skip the branch deletion when the self-removal guard fires, matching the skip of `git worktree remove`. Move the branch delete inside the `if [[ "$_harvest_worktree_path" != "$_harvest_session_root" ]]` block.

Raised as a minor finding by dso:code-reviewer-standard during review of diff hash 5d87fdff2f2e… Non-blocking (minor severity).

comments.body: Investigation found clear fix path but committing blocked: tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh fails in test-batched.sh (passes standalone). Pre-existing flakiness unrelated to the fix. ESCALATE: either fix the test-batched flakiness first, or apply the fix with exempt test marker.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC) — clear logic fix: git branch -D runs unconditionally when self-removal guard fires
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Hypothesis: git branch -D WORKTREE_BRANCH runs unconditionally at line 274, outside the _harvest_worktree_path guard block. In the self-removal scenario (where _harvest_worktree_path == _harvest_session_root), git rejects the deletion (current branch) but || true swallows the error. Fix: restructure cleanup block to guard branch deletion inside the self-removal guard. Regression guard (test 21) verifies no-worktree branch deletion still works after restructure. Approved for implementation.
comments.author: Test
